name: wxcode-admin-savory-pos
title: Savory POS Admin
description: Restaurant point-of-sale back-office admin: warm light mode, amber + tomato accent, left sidebar with venue switcher, live orders kanban (New / Cooking / Served), KPI tiles, top-selling items, sales sparkline, and recent orders table.

query.en: Build me a restaurant POS back-office admin dashboard — venue switcher sidebar, live orders kanban board, daily KPI tiles, top-selling items, sales sparkline, and recent orders table.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a restaurant POS back-office admin dashboard — venue switcher sidebar, live orders kanban board, daily KPI tiles, top-selling items, sales sparkline, and recent orders table.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
